summary: new-solt: child_process shell execution flagged, intent unverified
details: Package index.js imports child_process and invokes execSync with bash/zsh shell strings (lines 315 and 331). Without further tracing it is not possible to determine whether these shell calls are reachable at install/import time or only from explicit user-invoked code paths, nor whether the executed commands operate on attacker-controlled content. The package name and small file count are also notable. Recommending human review to confirm whether the shell exec paths constitute installer-side harm before publishing a verdict.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
